title: Basic JavaScript Recursion
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Recursion. Focus on implementing Recursive function definition correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Recursion
description: Create a function that uses Recursive function definition and Base case and recursive case together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Recursion Project
description: Build a small application that applies Recursive function definition, Base case and recursive case, Call stack in recursion in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Recursion
description: The following code has bugs related to Recursive function definition. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Recursion
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Recursive function definition and Base case and recursive case.
